Welcome to DragonballGT.com! I hope you enjoy this site as much as I do. This site is a page for all DB, DBZ, DBGT fans. Special thanks to Cell Perfect Domain, Benjamin Flores, and my sister Ana Rodas, which you can E-mail her at AnaRodas@hotmail.com she is the one in charge of updating this page every Saturday, of the week. If you see anything wrong, E-mail me at vegetto@dbgt.com and I will be glad to correct it.This Site, is not the official DBGT page, but is pretty close! as you can see, this page is not all done yet, why is for that, because we haven't had much time, to complete this site for all you fans! so we ask you to help us out, by sending us your critics, and your comments to us. This page will be fully up, by March 1,1999. Remember, that this is not an official page!, so don't anyone come e-mailing me, saying that you don't have authority over this site! Well those are all the requirements for this page! So If you have any questions or comments, don't forget to E-mail either my sister or me! Thank you! and please sign my guestbook while you are in this page, so that I know who came in! One more thing! The name doesn't tell all! Think about it!


people have visited my site since February 15,1999!
